description: Manages OAuth app access, API client controls, and domain-wide delegation for Google Workspace. Standard allows third-party apps and open API access, Elevated restricts to admin-approved apps, Strict disables third-party access and locks down delegation.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Third-party apps allowed with user consent. Domain-wide delegation enabled. API access open.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Third-party apps restricted to admin-approved only. Delegation enabled but audited. API access restricted.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No third-party app access. Domain-wide delegation disabled. API access locked to trusted clients only.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls third-party app access and API delegation settings.

group_ids.label: Group IDs
group_ids.client_description: Map of group names to IDs from the groups module.

enable_third_party_apps.label: Allow Third-Party Apps
enable_third_party_apps.client_description: Whether users can grant OAuth access to third-party applications. When disabled, only admin-approved apps (and trusted_apps) can access user data.

enable_domain_wide_delegation.label: Allow Domain-Wide Delegation
enable_domain_wide_delegation.client_description: Whether service accounts can impersonate users via domain-wide delegation. Required for many integrations (HRIS sync, SIEM, backup) but represents significant security risk if misconfigured.

api_client_access.label: API Client Access Level
api_client_access.client_description: Control how API clients access Google Workspace data. 'open' allows any authenticated client. 'restricted' limits to admin-approved scopes. 'locked' limits to explicitly trusted client IDs only.

trusted_apps.label: Trusted App Client IDs
trusted_apps.client_description: OAuth client IDs that are always allowed regardless of third-party app restrictions. Use for critical integrations that must maintain access.

outputs.third_party_apps_ou_path: OU path for third-party app access policy
outputs.delegation_policy_ou_path: OU path for domain-wide delegation policy
outputs.api_access_policy_ou_path: OU path for API client access policy
outputs.third_party_apps_enabled: Whether third-party app access is enabled
outputs.effective_api_client_access: The resolved API client access level
